## Description

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` applied
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] `cargo audit` clean (run if new dependencies added)
- [ ] Telemetry remains opt-in (no default-enabled data collection added)
- [ ] `AuditLog` remains append-only (no delete or clear method added)
- [ ] No credentials, OTLP endpoints or AAD secrets committed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] API documentation updated if new endpoints added

## Related Issues

Closes #
